title: Rendered Artifact Validation
scope: validate rendered Markdown/JSON/YAML artifacts against confirmed contract field values
update CLI docs and book markdown source without regenerating PDF

checks.helper_checks: validate-state/next-step passed for project_builder and hybrid_executor
checks.history_event_output_flow: lock, validate-lock, intake, generate-output, validate-output, validate-artifacts passed
checks.repo_check: passed with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 after generated metadata cleanup

known_limitations: M46.3 validates rendered value presence and missing artifact files; full cross-artifact semantic contradiction detection is planned for consistency layer.
repo-check is intended for clean source archive / CI before editable install metadata is created, or with PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1.
